dataset.name: Prepmate Programmatic SEO Dataset
dataset.purpose: Generate exam-subject-feature SEO pages for Prepmate using normalized data and reusable templates.

routing.notFoundRule: Return 404 when examSlug, subjectSlug, featureSlug or their combination is not listed in pages.

descriptions.notes: Study {examName} {subjectName} notes arranged around {outlineSummary}. Use Prepmate for the full lessons, examples, revision support and practice questions.
descriptions.syllabus: See the major {examName} {subjectName} syllabus areas, including {outlineSummary}. Download Prepmate to study the full outline with notes and practice support.
descriptions.past-questions: Practise {examName} {subjectName} past questions from {yearRange}. Prepmate helps you attempt questions, review answers and prepare with a mobile-friendly CBT experience.
descriptions.novels: Study {examName} {subjectName} prescribed texts with summaries, settings, themes, characters, language/style notes, chapter or event outlines and likely practice questions.

notes: Use the Notes section to study the topic outline and continue with practice questions.
syllabus: Use the Syllabus section to review the areas you are expected to cover before practising.
past-questions: Choose a year between {startYear} and {endYear}, then practise in CBT mode.
novels: Open Novels to study the prescribed text outlines and answer the available practice questions.

cta.title: Continue in Prepmate
cta.body: Download Prepmate to study the full content, practise questions and track your exam preparation.

subject_count.question: How many subjects are available for {examName} {subjectName} {featureName}?
subject_count.answer: {examName} currently has {examSubjectCount} subjects available in Prepmate. This page focuses on {subjectName} {featureName}.

syllabus_basis.question: Are the topics based on the {examName} syllabus?
syllabus_basis.answer: Yes. The topics are arranged to help students revise the main {examName} {subjectName} areas before moving into practice.

download_app.question: How can I download the Prepmate app?
download_app.answer: Download Prepmate from your app store, open the app, select {examName}, then choose {subjectName} to continue studying.

notes_coverage.question: What topics does the {subjectName} note cover?
notes_coverage.answer: The notes cover {outlineSummary}. More explanations, examples and practice support are available inside Prepmate.

past_years.question: How many years of past questions are there in {examName} {subjectName} Past Questions?
past_years.answer: {examName} {subjectName} past questions are available from {startYear} to {endYear}, giving students {yearCount} years of practice.

question_format.question: What question format is available for {examName} {subjectName}?
question_format.answer: {examName} practice questions for this subject use {questionFormat}. Prepmate presents them in a study-friendly format.

novel_likely_questions.question: Does each novel include likely questions?
novel_likely_questions.answer: Yes. The novels include practice questions based on their chapters, events, themes, characters and study sections.

novel_outlines.question: What does each prescribed text include?
novel_outlines.answer: Each text can include summary, background, setting, themes, characterisation, language or style notes, chapter/event outlines and practice questions.

app_more_details.question: Do I need Prepmate to see the full details?
app_more_details.answer: Yes. This page outlines what is available, while the full lessons, questions, answers and progress tools are inside the Prepmate app.

cbt_practice.question: Can I practise {examName} {subjectName} in CBT format?
cbt_practice.answer: Yes. Prepmate is designed to help students practise with a CBT-style experience and review their preparation from the app.

route_subject.question: What will I find on the {examName} {subjectName} {featureName} page?
route_subject.answer: The page shows the {featureName} available for {examName} {subjectName}, including the relevant outline, instructions and app download prompt.
